display_description: Configure the Intel AIPC development environment on Windows: Python, Git, ModelScope, latest-stable OpenVINO, PyTorch CPU. Domestic mirrors are opt-in via -China.
detail_describe: Sets up an Intel AIPC (Windows) development environment: installs Python, Git, ModelScope, the latest stable OpenVINO, and PyTorch CPU. Pass -China to apply domestic mirrors (Tsinghua pip + ghproxy git, with the existing pip.ini backed up); without it, existing pip/git config is left untouched. CMake and Visual Studio are optional components. Runs locally; no admin rights required for the base install.
name: openvino-environment-management
use_cases: Configure the Intel AIPC dev environment on Windows
Install Python, Git, ModelScope, OpenVINO, and PyTorch CPU
Optionally install CMake / Visual Studio for C++ builds
author: Max/Ethan
